item.title: This Week on The Analog Antiquarian 摘要
item.description:
The author announces a one-week hiatus for spring home-and-garden work, promising to return in two weeks with new content focused on games. The post also references 'Opus 1: The Comedy of Errors' as the main article, though the provided excerpt is brief and primarily serves as a scheduling notice.
标签: blog, hiatus, announcement, games, spring, home, garden, schedule, content

item.title: David Reich – Why the Bronze Age was an inflection point in human evolution 摘要
item.description:
David Reich and Ali Akbari published a paper overturning the consensus that natural selection has been dormant since the agricultural revolution. By scaling ancient DNA sequencing and developing a new statistical method, they found selection accelerated, especially during the Bronze Age (~3,000 years ago). Over 10,000 years, selection pushed genetic predictors of cognitive performance up by roughly one standard deviation, mostly between 4,000 and 2,000 years ago. Reich also proposed a heretical model: Neanderthals are genetically-swamped modern humans, sharing the same cultural ancestry, differing only by which archaic humans they mixed with.
标签: ancient DNA, natural selection, human evolution, Neanderthals, Bronze Age, cognitive performance, genetics, David Reich, archaeology, population genetics

item.title: George Orwell's review of Russel's Power: A New Social Analysis 摘要
item.description:
The author recounts rediscovering a George Orwell book review from 1939 that had disappeared from the searchable internet. Originally published in The Adelphi, the review is more than a simple critique, offering broader insights. After searching, the author recovered a copy from the Internet Archive, where both the text and original scanned version are now available. The experience highlights the fragility of digital content and the importance of archival efforts in preserving historical writings.
标签: George Orwell, book review, digital preservation, Internet Archive, The Adelphi, 1939, lost content, archival, literature

item.title: Using Claude Code: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of HTML 摘要
item.description:
Thariq Shihipar from Anthropic's Claude Code team argues that HTML is a superior output format to Markdown when prompting LLMs like Claude, because HTML enables rich features such as SVG diagrams, interactive widgets, and in-page navigation. The author, Simon Willison, reflects on his long-standing preference for Markdown due to token efficiency but now sees the value of HTML for richer explanations. He tests the approach by having GPT-5.5 explain a Linux security exploit (copy.fail) as an interactive HTML page, with good results. The piece encourages experimenting with HTML for ad-hoc prompts to make AI-generated content more engaging and informative.
标签: html, markdown, ai, prompt-engineering, llm, claude-code, security, generative-ai, llms, explainability

item.title: AI makes weak engineers less harmful 摘要
item.description:
Software engineering ability is heavy-tailed, with top engineers vastly outperforming average ones and weak engineers often being net-negative. The author argues that AI coding tools like Claude Code have raised the floor for weak engineers, turning their output from obviously broken to merely flawed but functional. However, some weak engineers become thin wrappers around AI, simply relaying prompts and responses via Slack, which is an improvement for the team but a poor use of salary. Strong engineers do not rely on AI this way, as they have enough taste to catch AI errors. The author predicts a future push to evaluate what value engineers add beyond AI.
标签: software engineering, AI, LLM, Claude Code, productivity, engineering management, talent distribution, coding agents, workplace dynamics, AI-assisted development
